productDisplayName: Nike Women Dow 3 Lea White Sports Shoe
description: Enjoy your runs in style with the nike Downshifter 3 LEA running shoe. Lightweight and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees.Upper    * Synthetic leather upper with mesh strips on the back foot for breathability and structural comfort    * Meshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for snug Fit and comfort    * Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort    * Synthetic overlays with swooshes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMidsole    * Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption    * Encapsulated Air-Sole unit for enhanced cushioning    * External heel counter to lock the foot in placeOutsole    * BRS 1000 rubber outsole for durability    * Rubber shank for absolute midfoot support and torsional rigidity through midstance    * Forefoot flex grooves for smooth transition    * Hell scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protection    * Multi-directional and multi-depth rectangular and triangle lugs in the forefoot and heel for better gripShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
